name: POD (proof of delivery)
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: The signed or captured confirmation that goods were delivered; the billing trigger.

name: Backload
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Return-leg cargo that turns an empty return into revenue.

name: Demurrage / standing time
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Charges for vehicle time lost waiting at loading or border points.

name: Consignment note
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: The document accompanying goods in transit identifying consignor, consignee and cargo.

name: Bonded cargo
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Goods moving under customs control before duty payment; agent licensing is a declared research gap.

name: Fleet classes
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Common vehicle classes (rigid, tautliner, flatbed, tanker, refrigerated) used for rating and allocation.

name: Fuel norm
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Expected consumption per vehicle class used to detect fuel loss.

name: Turnaround time
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Time from job start to vehicle available again; drives utilisation.
